figures.caption: Fig. 2: Library of parameter-efficient surrogate blocks for each base block

Fig. 1: a) Visual Results showing the low quality given as input and high quality images generated by TOC-SR. b) and c) Comparison of Params and GMACs of base SD1.5 model, adapted SD1.5 model and TOC-SR.

Fig. 3: Qualitative comparison on ×4 super-resolution. We compare TOCSR against representative diffusion SR baselines. TOC-SR better preserves fine textures and thin structures while avoiding over-smoothing and unnatural micro-textures. Please zoom in for details.
Table 1: Quantitative comparison on the DIV2K validation set [1]. Best, second, and third results are highlighted in red, blue, and green.
Table 2: Quantitative comparison on real-world datasets. Best, second, and third results are highlighted in red, blue, and green.
